default.$description: Main text; high-emphasis content on light foregrounds. Primary text colour.

inverse.$description: Primary text on dark foregrounds (footer, hero overlays, dark CTAs).

default.$description: Supporting text; body copy and less-emphasis content.
Accent text colour. Used for eyebrow / lead-in copy and other emphasised text moments where attention is needed without communicating a status. Resolves to amber/600 by default.

inverse.$description: Accent text colour on dark/inverted surfaces. Resolves to amber/300.

default.$description: Link text colour (legacy). New work should use nbds/color/link/default. Will be reviewed for deprecation in Phase 5.
Promotional text (sale, limited edition messaging). NB Red for brand prominence.

bold.$description: Text on bold negative (red) feedback foregrounds. Guaranteed AA against feedback/foreground/negative/bold.
Text on bold positive (green) feedback foregrounds.
Text on bold warning (amber) feedback foregrounds.

default.$description: Primary page canvas. Z = 0 (per strategy §6.2.0). Strictly non-interactive.

inverse.$description: Primary page canvas when the page is dark.

default.$description: Error / destructive message text on light foregrounds.
Success message text.
Warning / caution message text.
Error border (form fields, alerts).
Success border.
Warning border.

bold.$description: Prominent error fill (banners, toasts, critical alerts). NB Red.

default.$description: Error icon.
Success icon.
Warning icon.
Default border on standard foregrounds.
Subtle divider for separating content blocks.
Secondary foreground; layered content above primary foreground. Z = 2.
Primary foreground; base layer for components on the page background. Z=1.

inverse.$description: Primary foreground for dark CTA/footer panels.

default.$description: Tertiary foreground; deepest nesting tier. Z=3.
Default icon colour on light foregrounds.
Subdued icon for low-emphasis use.
Primary button fill, default state. NB Black.

focused.$description: Primary button fill, focused (colour unchanged; focus ring handles indication).

default-inverse.$description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/default. Use on dark surfaces.

disabled-inverse.$description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/disabled. Use on dark surfaces.

hovered-inverse.$description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/hovered. Use on dark surfaces.

pressed-inverse.$description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/foreground/primary/pressed. Use on dark surfaces.

default.$description: Secondary button fill, default (transparent or matches surface).
Primary button text/icon colour, default state.

default-inverse.$description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/text/primary/default. Use on dark surfaces.

disabled-inverse.$description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/text/primary/disabled. Use on dark surfaces.

default.$description: Secondary button text, default.
Secondary button border, default state.

focused.$description: Secondary button border, focused. Re-alias to focus ring after 3.4.

default-inverse.$description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/border/secondary/default. Use on dark surfaces.

hovered-inverse.$description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/border/secondary/hovered. Use on dark surfaces.

pressed-inverse.$description: Inverse-context sibling of nbds/color/button/border/secondary/pressed. Use on dark surfaces.

default.$description: Primary button border (same as fill — no visible border by default).

focused.$description: Primary button border, focused. Aliased to NB Red — re-alias to focus ring after 3.4.

default.$description: Primary button icon, default.
Secondary button icon, default.
Link colour, default state.

focused.$description: Link focused. Aliased to NB Red — will re-alias to focus ring after Phase 3.4.

focused-inverse.$description: Focused link on dark. Will re-alias to focus ring inverse after Phase 3.4.

default.$description: Default text on interactive elements.

default-inverse.$description: Default interactive text on dark foregrounds.

default.$description: Default icon on interactive elements.
Default fill of interactive container (chip, list row).
Default border for interactive form elements.

focused.$description: Focused interactive border. Aliased to NB Red until focus ring tokens are created in Phase 3.4 — should re-alias to nbds/color/focus/ring/color/default then.

focused-inverse.$description: Focused border on dark. Will re-alias to focus ring inverse after 3.4.
